evaluators.name: Node.js Create Project Sample Name Update Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the editable Node.js POST /projects request sample after updating the name field to use the example value 'Sample Project A' instead of the default 'My First Project'.

evaluators.name: List Users Try-It Filter Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user used the GET /users Try-It console with created_after set to the documented example date and per_page set to the non-default example value.

evaluators.name: Order Details Version Switch Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user viewed both v1 and v2 versions of the GET /orders/{id} endpoint and ended on the newer v2 version that supports the include query parameter.

evaluators.name: POST /payments Rate Limit Identification Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user viewed the rate limit rule for POST /payments and captured the documented per-minute limit of 120 requests per minute.

evaluators.name: Invoice Paid Webhook Payload Copy Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the raw JSON payload example for the invoice.paid webhook event using the provided copy control.

evaluators.name: Python SDK Delete Customer Method Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user viewed the Python SDK Customers.delete_customer method (which deletes a customer by ID), indicating they opened the example that demonstrates this call.

evaluators.name: API Key Bearer cURL Auth Example Copy Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied the cURL authentication example that sends an API key as a bearer token in the Authorization header.

evaluators.name: List Pending Orders Try-It Configuration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user used the GET /orders Try-It console with example values to list only pending orders on a later page, with increased page size and sorted by newest first.
